name: admin-dashboard-functions
description: Firebase Cloud Functions for Admin Dashboard - News Ticker API

scripts.start: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions --project admin-dashboard-staging
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions --project admin-dashboard-prod

author: Admin Dashboard Team
